config.title: CREATOR_TITLE #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'NX_TRACE_SUB_START
#include "50519"
'------------------------------------------------ ' przedzialy czasowe w ktorych umieszczamy klienta '------------------------------------------------ '-- dodanie funkcji realize_publication dla wezwanie_do_zaplaty
#include "50518"
'-- dodanie funkcji AddComputerName dla wezwanie_do_zaplaty
#include "50211"
#include "50200" #include "50212"
#define SEGMENTS_COUNT 5 dim g_oSegments(SEGMENTS_COUNT,3)
'-- col(0) - minimal delay '-- col(1) - maximal delay '-- col(2) - action name '------------------------------------------------ function init_segments g_oSegments(0,0) = 0 g_oSegments(0,1) = 3 g_oSegments(0,2) = "Informacja o saldzie"
g_oSegments(1,0) = g_oSegments(0,1) + 1 g_oSegments(1,1) = 7 g_oSegments(1,2) = "Informacja o saldzie"
g_oSegments(2,0) = g_oSegments(1,1) + 1 g_oSegments(2,1) = 14 g_oSegments(2,2) = "Wezw. do zapłaty"
g_oSegments(3,0) = g_oSegments(2,1) + 1 g_oSegments(3,1) = 21 g_oSegments(3,2) = "Wezw. do zapłaty 2"
g_oSegments(4,0) = g_oSegments(3,1) + 1 g_oSegments(4,1) = 9999 g_oSegments(4,2) = "Ostateczne wezw." end function
'------------------------------------------------ '-- standardowa funkcja wolana przy otwarciu strony function fopen : fopen = false init_segments frefresh fopen = true end function
'------------------------------------------------ '-- makra sterujace wydrukiem
VB_PRINT_LANDSCAPE_COMMON VB_PRINTPREV_LANDSCAPE_COMMON
'------------------------------------------------ '-- standardowa funkcja wolana na przycisk 'odswiez' function frefresh dim pModRapEngine : set pModRapEngine = doc_.getmodule(60108)
dim pParamArray : set pParamArray = get_default_param() if pModRapEngine.show_raport_param_dialog(pParamArray,"CREATOR_TITLE") = 0 then exit function end if dim pPerforming : set pPerforming = doc_.performing("Trwa przygotowanie danych...")
fill_results pModRapEngine,pParamArray end function
'------------------------------------------------ '-- tworzenie tablicy parametrow dla raportu function get_default_param() dim pParamArray : set pParamArray = doc_.afc.new_navoarray()
pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_date_range("Data wymagalności").bindexpr("t_trans.dDataWym") pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_int("Dni spóźnienia") _ .bindexpr("(" + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) + " - t_trans.dDataWym)") pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Indeks klienta").bindexpr("t_klient.strIndeks") pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Nazwa klienta").bindexpr("t_klient.strNazwa") pParamArray.add doc_.afc.rap.param.new_text("Grupa klientów").bindexpr("t_gr_klient.strNazwa")
set get_default_param = pParamArray end function
'------------------------------------------------ '-- wypelnianie wynikami function fill_results(byref pModRapEngine,byref pParamArray) dim strSegmentCase strSegmentCase = "case " dim iSegment for iSegment = 0 to SEGMENTS_COUNT - 1 strSegmentCase = strSegmentCase + " when convert(int," +_ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) + " - t_trans.dDataWym) between " +_ cstr(g_oSegments(iSegment,0)) + " and " + cstr(g_oSegments(iSegment,1)) + " then " + cstr(iSegment) next strSegmentCase = strSegmentCase + " else -1 end"
dim strSQL
strSQL = "select 'c_segnr'=max(" + strSegmentCase + "),'c_field_first'=C_FIELD_KL_FIRST_EXPR,'c_field_second'=C_FIELD_KL_SECOND_EXPR, " +_ "'c_podmiot_idobj'= t_trans.wrefPodmiot,'c_podmiot_type'= t_trans.wrefPodmiot_wrt " +_ "from n5transakcja as t_trans " +_ "inner join n5klient as t_klient on t_trans.wrefPodmiot = t_klient.idobj and t_trans.wrefPodmiot_wrt =TYPEID_N5KLIENT " +_ "inner join n5grupaklient t_gr_klient on t_klient.pGrupaKlient= t_gr_klient.idobj " +_ "where t_trans.curWn <> t_trans.curMa and t_trans.eTyp=N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC and %1 and %2 and %3 and %4 and %5 " +_ "group by t_trans.wrefPodmiot,t_trans.wrefPodmiot_wrt " +_ "order by c_segnr,c_field_first "
dim strSQLSub : strSQLSub = "select 'c_datarozp'=t_trans.dDataRozp,'c_datawym'=t_trans.dDataWym, " +_ "'c_symb'=t_trans.strSymTrans,'c_trans_idobj'=t_trans.IdObj, " +_ "'c_wntrans'=t_trans.curWn,'c_matrans'= t_trans.curMa,'c_saldotrans'=t_trans.curWn-t_trans.curMa, " +_ "'c_waluta'=t_waluta.strSkrot,'c_prec'=3,'c_typ'=t_trans.eTyp, " +_ "'c_wnewid'=t_trans.curWnEwid,'c_maewid'=t_trans.curMaEwid,'c_saldoewid'=t_trans.curWnEwid-t_trans.curMaEwid " +_ "from n5transakcja as t_trans " +_ "inner join n5jednostka as t_waluta on t_trans.pWaluta = t_waluta.IdObj " +_ "where t_trans.curWn <> t_trans.curMa and t_trans.eTyp=N5TRANSAKCJA_NALEZNOSC and %1 and %2 and t_trans.wrefPodmiot=%PODMIOT% and t_trans.wrefPodmiot_wrt =TYPEID_N5KLIENT " +_ "order by c_datarozp,c_symb "
strSQL = pModRapEngine.query_apply_actual_param(strSQL,pParamArray) strSQLSub = pModRapEngine.query_apply_actual_param(strSQLSub,pParamArray)
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULT_TABLE)) pTB.section_body.removeall
dim nRecNr : nRecNr = 0 dim oRS : set oRS = trans_.createadors(strSQL) dim iLimit : iLimit = 1000 dim iLastSegment : iLastSegment = -9999 do while not oRS.EOF iSegment = clng(oRS("c_segnr")) if iLastSegment <> iSegment then ui_end_segment iLastSegment,pTB ui_start_segment iSegment,pTB iLastSegment = iSegment end if ui_build_customer oRS,pTB,strSQLSub
oRS.MoveNext
if nRecNr > iLimit then exit do end if nRecNr = nRecNr + 1 loop ui_end_segment iLastSegment,pTB end function
'------------------------------------------------ '-- zakonczenie segmentu (przedzialu czasowego) function ui_end_segment(iSegment,byref pTB) if iSegment <> -9999 then end if end function
'------------------------------------------------ '-- rozpoczecie segmentu (przedzialu czasowego) function ui_start_segment(iSegment,byref pTB) pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.fontsize=5 pTB.newcell pTB.cell.colspan=5 if iSegment >= 0 and iSegment < SEGMENTS_COUNT then pTB.addtext "Należności opóźnione pomiędzy " + cstr(g_oSegments(iSegment,0)) + " a " + cstr(g_oSegments(iSegment,1)) + " dni" else pTB.addtext "Przyszłe należności" end if end function
function section_hideshow_hli(byref pHLI) doc_.afc.formsection.section_hideshow page_, pHLI.prop(100) end function
'------------------------------------------------ '-- wypisanie jednego klienta
function ui_build_customer(byref oRS,byref pTB,byval strSQLSub) dim iSegment : iSegment = clng(oRS("c_segnr"))
dim iRecNr : iRecNr = 0
dim iPodmiotIdObj : iPodmiotIdObj = clng(oRS("c_podmiot_idobj"))
'---- section == customer with pTB.newrow.row .styleitem=STYLE_GROUP_HEADER set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_START) = clng(1) .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_HIDDEN) = clng(0) .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_REQ) = clng(0) end with
with pTB.newcell.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1).element .image = PICTURE_SMALL_MINUS .width = SIZE_FOR_PLUS .height = SIZE_FOR_PLUS .ignoresysdisable true .tip="Zwiń" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "section_hideshow_hli" .hli.prop(100) = clng(.ident) end with with pTB.cell .keepline=true .colspan=3 end with dim strHeader : strHeader = cstr(oRS("c_field_first")) + " (" + cstr(oRS("c_field_second")) + ")" pTB.addtexthli strHeader,_ doc_.createhlistr("OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5KLIENT," + cstr(iPodmiotIdObj) +",USAGE_VIEW)") pTB.element.bold=true
pTB.newcell pTB.cell.keepline = true
dim pCheckBox
if iSegment >= 0 and iSegment < SEGMENTS_COUNT then
pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1 set pCheckBox = pTB.element with pCheckBox .customredirect = clng(CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX) .transfer = page_.createtransfer("custom") .border = 0 end with pTB.element.addnew CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1 'pusty tekst ("do zaznaczania") pCheckBox.value = "1"
pTB.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 pTB.element.styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON pTB.element.text = g_oSegments(iSegment,2) dim oBtnHLI : set oBtnHLI = doc_.createhli()
oBtnHLI.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "action_hli" oBtnHLI.prop(100) = pTB.row.ident oBtnHLI.prop(101) = clng(iPodmiotIdObj) oBtnHLI.prop(102) = clng(iSegment)
set pTB.element.hli = oBtnHLI end if
strSQLSub = replace(strSQLSub,"%PODMIOT%",cstr(iPodmiotIdObj)) dim oRSSub : set oRSSub = trans_.createadors(strSQLSub)
dim curSaldoTrans dim curSaldoClient : curSaldoClient = ccur(0.0) do while not oRSSub.EOF dim iDays : iDays = clng(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) - cdate(oRSSub("c_datawym"))) pTB.newrow if iRecNr mod 2 = 0 then pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if pTB.newcell.addtext(cstr(oRSSub("c_symb"))) if iDays < 0 then pTB.element.forecolor= COLOR_FUTURE end if pTB.newcell.addtext(cstr(iDays)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if iDays < 0 then pTB.element.forecolor= COLOR_FUTURE end if
curSaldoTrans = ccur(oRSSub("c_saldoewid")) curSaldoClient = curSaldoClient + curSaldoTrans
pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curSaldoTrans,"")).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT if iDays < 0 then pTB.element.forecolor= COLOR_FUTURE end if
if iSegment >= 0 and iSegment < SEGMENTS_COUNT then pTB.newcell.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_CHECKBOX,-1 pTB.cell.keepline = true set pCheckBox = pTB.element with pCheckBox .border = 0 end with pTB.element.addnew CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1 'pusty tekst ("do zaznaczania") pCheckBox.value = "1" end if
set pTB.row.userprop = doc_.createhli() with pTB.row.userprop .prop(PRIV_PROP_ROW_TYPE) = clng(ROW_TYPE_DETAIL) .prop(101) = clng(oRSSub("c_trans_idobj")) end with
oRSSub.MoveNext iRecNr = iRecNr + 1 loop
'---- custommer summary with pTB.newrow.row set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_ROW_TYPE) = clng(ROW_TYPE_SUMMARY) end with pTB.newcell.cell.colspan = 2 pTB.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(curSaldoClient,"")).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.element.bold=true
'---- section end with pTB.newrow.row .hide = true set .userprop = doc_.createhli() .userprop.prop(PROPC_SECTION_END) = clng(1) end with '---- ----
end function
function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ongetdata = true end function
function c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) c##CTRLID_REDIRECT_CHKBOX##_ondataentered = true dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent set oRow = oRow.nextelement do while not oRow is nothing
if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PRIV_PROP_ROW_TYPE) then if oRow.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_ROW_TYPE) = clng(ROW_TYPE_SUMMARY) then exit do end if if oRow.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_ROW_TYPE) = clng(ROW_TYPE_DETAIL) then oRow.cell(4).element(1).value = newValue end if end if end if
set oRow = oRow.nextelement loop end function
function wezwanie_do_zaplaty2(byval vIdobjPodm,byref oNXArray)
dim oBtnHLI : set oBtnHLI = doc_.createhli() dim iTypDokumentu : iTypDokumentu = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5TYPDOKUMENTU,"strNazwa='Wezwania do zapłaty'") if iTypDokumentu <= 0 then nx_.trace.fatal "FKK001","Brak typu dokumentu 'Wezwania do zapłaty'" exit function end if
dim idDPC : idDPC = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5DPC, "ePubType=" + CStr(N5DPC_PUBTYPE_WEZWANIE_DO_ZAPLATY)) if idDPC < 1 then idDPC = fire_choice_list( TYPEID_N5DPC , "Publikacja typu 'Wezwanie do zapłaty'" ,"strNazwa","ePubType=" + CStr(N5DPC_PUBTYPE_WEZWANIE_DO_ZAPLATY) ,"","" ) if idDPC = 0 then nx_.trace.fatal "FKK002","Brak publikacji typu 'Wezwania do zapłaty'" exit function end if end if
dim oHLIResult : set oHLIResult = doc_.createhli() dim strN: strN="" dim iter for iter = 0 to oNXArray.upper_index strN=strN+cstr(oNXArray(iter))+"," next trans_.var(6001)=strN
if not is_email_publication(idDPC) then realize_publication idDPC, trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,vIdobjPodm),false,oHLIResult else dim pM60153 : set pM60153 = doc_.getmodule(60153) pM60153.choose_mail 0, vIdobjPodm, 0 dim sStrEmail : sStrEmail = pM60153.get_g_sStrMail if sStrEmail="" then MessageBox "Nie wysłano maila ... ","Informacja...", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function else 'tworzymy załącznik korzystając z funkcji realize_hardcopy_email (realize_hardcopy zwracająca ścieżkę pliku) dim pM60170:set pM60170 = doc_.getmodule(60170) dim pSO : set pSO = doc_.createstreamobj() dim pPublication : set pPublication = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DPC,idDPC) dim strPath : strPath = pM60170.realize_hardcopy_email(pPublication,trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,vIdobjPodm),false,nothing)
if strPath = "" then MessageBox "Błąd załącznika, nie wysłano maila... ","Informacja...", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if pSO.attach strPath
'treść wiadomości dim strMessage : strMessage = strRows(strPath)
dim pM60293 : set pM60293 = doc_.getmodule(60293) if not send_email(sStrEmail,g_oSegments(trans_.var(6002),2),pSO,"Załącznik.doc",strMessage) then MessageBox "Błąd załącznika, nie wysłano maila... ","Informacja...", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function else MessageBox "Twoja wiadomość zostala wysłana", "Zakończono wysyłanie", vbOKOnly, vbInformation end if end if end if
dim strPlikWezwaniaDoZaplaty : strPlikWezwaniaDoZaplaty = "" 'see realize_hardcopy implementation if oHLIResult.exists(3030) then strPlikWezwaniaDoZaplaty = oHLIResult.prop(3030) end if
dim idWDZ_Dokument : idWDZ_Dokument = clng(0) if strPlikWezwaniaDoZaplaty <> "" then
dim oWDZ_Dokument : set oWDZ_Dokument = trans_.newobj(TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT) oWDZ_Dokument.strTematDokum = _ left("Wezwanie do zapłaty z " + doc_.afc.display.fulldate(trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY)) + " do " +_ trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,vIdobjPodm).strSkrot,127)
set oWDZ_Dokument.pTypDokumentu = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5TYPDOKUMENTU,iTypDokumentu) set oWDZ_Dokument.wpAdresat = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,vIdobjPodm)
oWDZ_Dokument.dDataWeWy = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) oWDZ_Dokument.dDataRejestracji = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) oWDZ_Dokument.dok_dDataGenNastFry = dateserial(2199,12,31) oWDZ_Dokument.dok_dDataWystNastFry = dateserial(2199,12,31)
oWDZ_Dokument.nForma = cLng(1) oWDZ_Dokument.strFileName = AddComputerName(strPlikWezwaniaDoZaplaty) oWDZ_Dokument.fPlik.attach strPlikWezwaniaDoZaplaty idWDZ_Dokument = oWDZ_Dokument.idobj
if not trans_.saveobjects() then nx_.trace.fatal "FKK003","Nie można zachować dokumentu wezwania do zapłaty" exit function end if set oWDZ_Dokument = nothing
Create_FileDriveObject dim pPerforming : set pPerforming = doc_.performing("Otwieranie dokumentu...") Run strPlikWezwaniaDoZaplaty set pPerforming = nothing
end if
dim pUtility : set pUtility = doc_.getmodule(60158) 'wybór typu działania gdy brak dim idTypDzialania : idTypDzialania = pUtility.supply_typ_dzialania_on_iid_id(N5TYPDZIALANIA_IID_NOTATKA) if idTypDzialania <= 0 then exit function end if
trans_.var(APPVAR_REJESTR_TYP) = N5REJESTRDOK_ZADANIA trans_.var(GVAR_CURSOR) = clng(0) dim pOpenFormNotatka : set pOpenFormNotatka = doc_.getmodule(60129).prepare_form_open_command(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,0,0) if pOpenFormNotatka is nothing then exit function end if dim pFormZadanie : set pFormZadanie = doc_.getpagehli(pOpenFormNotatka) if pFormZadanie is nothing then exit function end if
with pFormZadanie.root .strTemat = "Wezwanie do zapłaty" set .pTypDzialania=trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5TYPDZIALANIA,idTypDzialania) .nStatus=clng(N5ZADANIE_ZAMKNIETE) .strOpis = "Wezwanie do zapłaty" set .pZlecajacy=getCurrentWykonawca() set .pWykonawca=getCurrentWykonawca() set .pKlient= trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT,vIdobjPodm) if idWDZ_Dokument <> 0 then set .listZalaczniki.addnew().wrefZal = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5DOKUMENT,idWDZ_Dokument) end if end with
pFormZadanie.domodalauto() end function
'---------------------------------------------- 'wysyłanie maila zawierającego treść załącznika '---------------------------------------------- function send_email(byval strEmail, byval strSubject, byref pInputStream, byval strAttchName, byval strMessage) NX_TRACE_SUB_START("Wysylka maila " + strSubject + " do " + strEmail) dim pM20136 : set pM20136 = doc_.getmodule(20136)
'do kogo pM20136.set_recipents_email strEmail 'tytuł pM20136.setSubject strSubject 'treść pM20136.setMessage strMessage
'załącznik dim pAttachment set pAttachment=new CMailAttachment set pAttachment.pSO=pInputStream pAttachment.strName = strAttchName pM20136.addAttachment pAttachment
'wyślij send_email = pM20136.send_internal()
NX_TRACE_END
end function
'------------------------------------ 'odczytuje kolejne słowa z pliku word '------------------------------------ function strRows(byval strPath) : strRows = "" dim oWordApp : set oWordApp = doc_.system.activex("Word.Application") dim oWordDoc : set oWordDoc = oWordApp.Documents.Open(strPath) oWordDoc.Activate
dim iter for iter = 1 to oWordDoc.Words.count strRows = strRows + ltrim(oWordDoc.Words(iter).text) next
strRows = rebuildTable(strRows)
oWordDoc.Close oWordApp.Quit end function
'-------------- 'rebuild tabeli '-------------- function rebuildTable(byval strRows) dim iPos1 : iPos1 = InStr(strRows,"LP" + chr(CHR_ENTER)) dim iPos2 : iPos2 = InStr(strRows,"Łącznie")
if iPos1 > 0 and iPos2 > 0 then rebuildTable = rebuildMsg(iPos1,iPos2,strRows) else iPos1 = InStr(strRows,"Transakcja") iPos2 = InStr(strRows,"Razem do") if iPos1 > 0 and iPos2 > 0 then rebuildTable = rebuildMsg(iPos1,iPos2,strRows) else rebuildTable = strRows end if end if end function
function rebuildMsg(byval iPos1, byval iPos2, byval strRows) 'rozdzielenie wiadomości na 3 części dim strPart1 : strPart1 = Mid(strRows,1,iPos1-1) dim strTable : strTable = Mid(strRows,iPos1,iPos2 - iPos1 - 1) dim strPart2 : strPart2 = Mid(strRows,iPos2)
dim tab : tab = Split(Replace(strTable,chr(CHR_SPACE),""), chr(CHR_ENTER)) dim iter for iter = 0 to ubound(tab) if tab(iter) = "" then tab(iter) = vbNewLine end if next strTable = Replace(Join(tab, " "),vbNewLine + " ",vbNewLine)
rebuildMsg = strPart1 + strTable + strPart2 end function
function action_hli(byref oHLI) dim iPodmiotIdobj : iPodmiotIdobj = clng(oHLI.prop(101)) dim iSegment : iSegment = clng(oHLI.prop(102)) dim oNXArray : set oNXArray = nx_.new_array()
dim oRow : set oRow = page_.ctrl(oHLI.prop(100)) set oRow = oRow.nextelement do while not oRow is nothing
if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PRIV_PROP_ROW_TYPE) then if oRow.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_ROW_TYPE) = clng(ROW_TYPE_SUMMARY) then exit do end if if oRow.userprop.prop(PRIV_PROP_ROW_TYPE) = clng(ROW_TYPE_DETAIL) then if oRow.cell(4).element(1).value = "1" then dim idTrans : idTrans = clng(oRow.userprop.prop(101)) oNXArray.add idTrans end if end if end if end if
set oRow = oRow.nextelement
loop
if oNXArray.upper_index >= clng(0) then trans_.var(6002)=iSegment wezwanie_do_zaplaty2 iPodmiotIdobj,oNXArray else trans_.message 7000, 0, "Nie wybrano transakcji." end if
end function
